summary: Frontend testing completed for TruVant car dealer website redesign. All 7 homepage sections render correctly, navigation works, filters functional, admin login successful. TruVant branding properly updated from Carloop.

minor.issue: Returns 401 for unauthenticated users (expected behavior, not a bug)

issues: React hydration warnings in console - HTML structure issue with <tr> inside <span> in table body. Low priority, development-only warning.

passed_tests: Homepage Hero section renders with 'Buy Trusted Used Cars' and 'Without the Stress' text
Homepage search filters (Budget, Brand, Type) visible and functional
Search Cars button navigates to inventory page
Trust Badges section with 5 green icons (Verified Cars, No Hidden Charges, RC Transfer Support, Loan Assistance, Home Delivery)
Featured Premium Cars section displays car cards with View Details and WhatsApp buttons
Why Buy From TruVant section with 5 items (Carefully Selected, Verified Docs, Fair Pricing, Quick Delivery, After Sales)
Budget Discovery section (Find Your Perfect Match) with 5 budget categories
Testimonials section with YouTube video embeds
Final CTA section with 'Tell Us Your Requirement' button navigating to contact page
Footer shows TruVant branding with © 2026 TruVant copyright
Navigation between Home, Inventory, Contact pages works correctly
Inventory page filters (fuel type, transmission, price) work correctly
Inventory page search by make/model works
Callback modal opens and closes correctly on inventory page
Contact page form loads with all fields (name, email, phone, message)
Admin login works with credentials admin@carloop.com / admin123
Admin dashboard loads with inventory management table
WhatsApp floating button visible with correct phone number (918683996996)
View Details button on car cards navigates to car detail page
Car detail page shows car information and features
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.js has HTML structure issue causing React hydration warnings - <span> wrapper around <tr> elements in table body. Consider removing the wrapper or restructuring the table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 homepage sections verified: Hero, Trust Badges, Featured Cars, Why Buy From Us, Budget Discovery, Testimonials, Final CTA. TruVant branding confirmed in footer. Admin login and dashboard functional. WhatsApp button working. Minor React hydration warning in AdminDashboard (development only).

mocked_apis_list: Email notifications for callbacks are logged but not sent
